title: AKZO NOBEL (DIY DULUX), Pure Brilliant White, 2.5 L (Pack of 1)
features: Capacity: 13m²/L per coat. This 2.5L can will cover 32.5m² with one coat (approx)
Washable paint that stays the way you painted it
description: From the manufacturer Be Inspired Wild Primrose is a soft creamy yellow. A Dulux classic, this colour is popular in kitchens, hallways and landing spaces. It adds an inviting, friendly feeling to your room. Frosted Steel is a very pale grey with a blue tone. It’s a pleasing alternative to stark bright white. This colour is a favourite for kitchens but works well in any space. It creates a calming and neutral backdrop in your room. Mint Macaroon is a soft, pastel duck egg blue. It has the positive attributes of both blue and green and creates a feeling of clarity and refreshment. Deep Fossil is a strong solid urban grey. This classic grey is a favourite for feature walls. Dark greys are commanding colours, but easily scheme into your existing décor.
